entities.name: Material weaknesses in internal control over financial reporting
entities.context: We identified material weaknesses in our internal control over financial reporting, which could impact our ability to report our results of operations and financial condition accurately and in a timely manner.

entities.name: FY2025 goodwill impairment - U.S. reporting unit
entities.context: For the year ended December 31, 2025, we recognized a $301 million impairment of goodwill which represents the amount by which the carrying value of goodwill exceeded its implied fair value.

entities.name: Global operations expose Organon to additional risks
entities.context: We have significant global operations, which expose us to additional risks, and any adverse event could adversely affect our results of operations and financial condition.

entities.name: Tariffs, trade restrictions or domestic sourcing requirements
entities.context: The imposition of tariffs on, or other trade restrictions or domestic sourcing requirements ... could have a material adverse effect on our business, financial condition, results of operations, cash flows, ability to pay dividends or repurchase shares, or stock price.

entities.name: Adverse global or local economic developments
entities.context: Adverse developments in the global economy or in one or more of our local markets could impact our ability to grow our business.

entities.name: Changes in tax laws or other tax guidance
entities.context: Changes in tax laws or other tax guidance could adversely affect our effective tax rates, financial condition or results of operations.

entities.name: Material weaknesses in ICFR (risk factor)
entities.context: We identified material weaknesses in our internal control over financial reporting, which could impact our ability to report our results of operations and financial condition accurately and in a timely manner.

entities.name: Cyberattacks affecting IT systems
entities.context: Cyberattacks affecting our IT systems could result in exposure of confidential information, the modification of critical data or the disruption of our worldwide operations, including manufacturing and sales operations.

entities.name: Inability to execute deleveraging plan
entities.context: We may not be able to successfully execute our plan to deleverage our business or otherwise reduce our debt level, which could adversely affect our operating flexibility, business, financial condition, results of operations, or cash flows.

entities.name: Substantial indebtedness
entities.context: Our substantial indebtedness could adversely affect our financial condition and results of operations.

entities.name: Restrictive covenants under indebtedness
entities.context: We are subject to a number of restrictive covenants under our indebtedness, including customary operating restrictions and financial covenants, which could restrict our ability to pay dividends or adversely affect our financing options and liquidity position.

entities.name: Concentration in key products
entities.context: Key products generate a significant amount of our profits and cash flows, and any events that adversely affect the markets for our leading products could adversely affect our results of operations and financial condition.

entities.name: Healthcare reform initiatives and regulatory actions
entities.context: Recent global healthcare reform initiatives and U.S., judicial decisions, laws, regulations, executive orders and political actions could adversely affect our future revenues and profitability.

entities.name: Goodwill impairment risk
entities.context: An impairment of our Goodwill could materially impact our financial condition and results of operations.

entities.name: Limited scope of intellectual property licenses
entities.context: Our growth could be limited by the scope of our intellectual property licenses.

entities.name: Disruptions at FDA, SEC and comparable foreign agencies
entities.context: Disruptions at the FDA, the SEC and other comparable foreign government agencies caused by funding shortages or other events could hinder their ability ... which could negatively impact our business.

entities.name: Product quality issues
entities.context: Issues with product quality could have an adverse effect on our business or cause a loss of customer confidence in us or our products

entities.name: Component or raw material supply difficulties
entities.context: We may be unable to obtain sufficient components or raw materials on a timely basis or for a cost-effective price, or we may experience other supply difficulties

entities.name: Reliance on third-party relationships and outsourcing
entities.context: Reliance on third-party relationships and outsourcing arrangements could materially adversely affect our business.

entities.name: Third-party AI and ethical compliance risk
entities.context: If we or our third-party suppliers, logistics providers, and manufacturers do not comply with ethical business practices or with related laws and regulations, including relating to AI use, our reputation, business, financial condition, results of operations or prospects could be harmed.

entities.name: Biosimilar regulatory risks and uncertainties
entities.context: Biosimilars carry unique regulatory risks and uncertainties, which could adversely affect our results of operations and financial condition.

entities.name: FDA radical transparency / CRL release
entities.context: The FDA's shift toward radical transparency, including plans to release future complete response letters promptly after they are issued to sponsors and increase enforcement in advertising and promotion, could have an adverse impact on our business

entities.name: China VBP and pricing pressure
entities.context: China has made reduction of costs and provision of affordable pharmaceutical products to patients a key priority and has implemented reimbursement and procurement programs to achieve these goals, such as VBP and URPS.

entities.name: China and emerging markets investment risk
entities.context: We may not realize benefits from our investments in China and emerging markets.

entities.name: Privacy and data protection regulatory risk
entities.context: We are subject to a significant number of privacy and data protection laws and regulations globally ... GDPR ... PIPL ... U.S. state privacy laws.

entities.name: Common Stock price and trading volume volatility
entities.context: The price and trading volume of our Common Stock may be volatile, and stockholders could lose all or part of their investment in our Company.

entities.name: FY2025 10-K forward-looking statements (PSLRA safe harbor)
entities.context: expectations for financial, business or strategic matters regarding or affecting us that are forward-looking statements within the meaning of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995
